title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 20 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 20 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 20 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/12/2023
DCE iron ore have stopped falling and rebounded, the main contract I2405 closed 939, an increaseof 1.46% throughout the day. some traders were active to sell, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
